description: Building modern, scalable and responsive web applications with clean code and great user experience.
aboutText1: I am a Full Stack Developer and Software Engineering student with a strong engineering background and practical IT experience.
aboutText2: Since 2021, I have been working as a Computer Systems and Networks Specialist at Veolia Energy Tashkent, gaining hands-on experience in enterprise IT infrastructure and network systems.
aboutText3: Currently, I am pursuing Software Engineering studies at TATU while simultaneously improving my modern web development skills through the Web Practicum program at Najot Ta'lim.
aboutText4: My first academic background is in Mechanical Engineering Technology, where I earned a Bachelor's degree as an Engineer-Technologist.
tstuDescription: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering Technology at Islam Karimov Tashkent State Technical University. Graduated as an Engineer-Technologist.
veoliaDescription: Working as a Computer Systems and Networks Specialist, responsible for enterprise IT infrastructure and network systems.
tatuDescription: Software Engineering student at Muhammad al-Khwarizmi Tashkent University of Information Technologies (TATU).
najotDescription: Currently studying Full Stack Web Development in the Web Practicum program at Najot Ta'lim Learning Center.
projectsDescription: A collection of real-world applications and full stack projects built using modern technologies and best practices.
